# freeswitch_callcenter_agent (Resource)

A mod_callcenter agent. `contact` is usually `user/<number>@<domain>` of a freeswitch_user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "freeswitch_callcenter_agent" "agent_4201" {
  name    = "4201@192.168.48.143"
  contact = "user/4201@192.168.48.143"
  status  = "Available"

  # for demos: retry an unanswered agent quickly
  no_answer_delay_time = 5
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `contact` (String)
- `name` (String) Agent name, e.g. `4201@192.168.48.143`.

### Optional

- `busy_delay_time` (Number)
- `max_no_answer` (Number)
- `no_answer_delay_time` (Number)
- `params` (Map of String)
- `reject_delay_time` (Number)
- `status` (String) Initial status on load (live status is runtime state).
- `type` (String)
- `wrap_up_time` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# freeswitch_callcenter_agent is imported by its name.
terraform import freeswitch_callcenter_agent.agent_4201 "4201@192.168.48.143"
```
